{{ partial "navbar.html" . }}

ARIES Science Club

Our Mission

The ARIES Science Club is a joint initiative dedicated to exploring the universe. Our aim is to foster a collaborative environment for research scholars, organize academic lectures, and bridge the gap between complex astrophysical concepts and community outreach.

Learn More ↓
